title: Union Bancaire Privee UBP SA Makes New Investment in Alliant Energy Corporation $LNT
summary: Union Bancaire Privee UBP SA bought a new position in shares of Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT – Free Report) in the fourth quarter, according to the company in its most recent disclosure with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The institutional investor bought 14,282 shares of the company’s stock, valued at approximately $928,000. A number [...]
